title: MCP Hero (mcpolis)
goal:
MCP Hero (codename `mcpolis`) is a self-hostable **gateway for Model Context Protocol (MCP)
servers**. Normally every person wires each MCP server into each AI client separately, with no
shared way to control access or audit calls. MCP Hero mounts many upstream MCP servers behind a
single URL and adds the missing team layer: role-based access control down to individual tools,
per-user OAuth to upstreams (encrypted tokens), hosted execution of `command:`-style stdio MCPs in
isolated sandboxes, an audit log of every tool call, and revocable service tokens for headless
agents. It runs either as a zero-config single-tenant **standalone** instance (file-backed) or as a
multi-tenant **cloud** SaaS (MongoDB + Redis + E2B; what powers mcphero.io). The audience is teams
who want a curated, governed set of MCP tools shared across their AI assistants.

roles.name: Org creator
roles.wants: Sign up and create an organization to govern their team's MCPs

roles.name: Org admin
roles.wants: Add/configure upstreams, define roles and per-tool access, manage the team, mint tokens, read audit
roles.drives: UC2, UC3, UC4, UC5, UC6, UC9, UC10, UC13, UC14, UC15, UC16, UC18, UC19, UC20, UC21, UC22, UC24, UC25

roles.name: Team member
roles.wants: Connect their AI client through the gateway and call the tools their role allows

roles.name: Headless agent
roles.wants: Connect without a browser sign-in and call tools under a least-privilege role

roles.name: Superadmin
roles.wants: Step into orgs for support, end sessions, clear stuck connections without seeing secrets

glossary.meaning: User-facing brand for the gateway product
Internal codename for every technical artifact (modules, DBs, env vars)
A tenant — the top-level isolation boundary everything is scoped to
A backend MCP server added to the gateway whose tools are proxied
Upstream reached at a URL (streamable-http transport)
`command:`-style upstream the gateway runs in a sandbox
The single MCP endpoint exposed to clients at `/mcp` or `/mcp/<slug>`
An action an upstream exposes; surfaced through the gateway with a prefixed name
readOnly / destructive / other annotation buckets used for role toggles
Named permission set deciding which MCPs and tools a member may use
Per-tool regex allow/forbid rule on argument values, enforced before forwarding
How an upstream authenticates: service-account, admin OAuth, or per-user OAuth
Each member signs in to the upstream as themselves; tokens stored encrypted
Revocable `svct_` bearer bound to one org and one role, for headless agents
Isolated environment that runs a stdio MCP command
Hosted sandbox provider (production default) for stdio MCPs
Per-MCP `${NAME}` value (plain or secret) substituted at launch
Per-MCP uploaded credential file written into the sandbox at session start
A second MCP at `/admin-mcp` for managing MCP Hero itself conversationally
Email-allowlisted operator with cross-org support access
Single-org file-backed mode vs multi-org Mongo/Redis SaaS
Per-org seat + feature limits (FREE vs TEAM)
A logged gateway action: who, what tool, policy decision, outcome, latency
URL-safe org name forming the gateway path `/mcp/<slug>`

use_cases.name: Sign up and create an organization
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Google sign-in first time → name the org, land on Upstream MCPs

use_cases.name: Add a remote HTTP upstream MCP
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Paste URL, pick auth mode → upstream added, tools discovered

use_cases.name: Add a hosted stdio upstream MCP
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Paste command JSON, fill variables, size sandbox → upstream added

use_cases.name: Connect or start an upstream
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Click Connect / Start / Authenticate → live session, tools light up

use_cases.name: Configure roles and per-MCP access
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Create role, toggle MCP enabled per role → role scoped to chosen MCPs

use_cases.name: Configure per-tool access and argument checks
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Set 3-state tool toggles and regex allow/forbid → tool calls constrained

use_cases.name: Connect human AI client via Google OAuth
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Point client at gateway URL, sign in → role's tools usable

use_cases.name: Per-user OAuth to an upstream
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Click Authenticate, consent in popup → personal upstream tokens stored encrypted

use_cases.name: Shared / admin OAuth to an upstream
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Sign in once on team's behalf → every member's call goes out as admin

use_cases.name: Mint a service token
use_cases.trigger_outcome: New token, pick name and role → `svct_` value shown once, JSON snippet given

use_cases.name: Headless agent calls tools via service token
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Send Bearer `svct_` to org gateway URL → tools at token's role, no sign-in

use_cases.name: List and call tools through the gateway
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Ask client to list/call tools → prefixed upstream tools returned and forwarded

use_cases.name: Invite a team member
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Add Google email, pick role, share invite link → member joins on sign-in

use_cases.name: Change a member's role
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Edit member, pick new role → access updates on next request

use_cases.name: Remove a team member
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Remove member → tokens revoked, per-user sessions dropped

use_cases.name: Revoke or rotate a service token
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Revoke / create-new-then-revoke → agent's next request fails

use_cases.name: View and filter the audit log
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Open Audit, set filters → matching entries, live SSE tail

use_cases.name: Manage template variables and passwords
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Add NAME values, toggle Treat-as-password → secrets encrypted and redacted

use_cases.name: Manage sandbox credential files
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Upload file, set target path → file written into sandbox at session start

use_cases.name: Import multiple MCPs at once
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Paste mcpServers JSON, pick entries → upstreams created in one go

use_cases.name: Extract an inline secret into a variable
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Paste JSON with raw token → dialog offers extraction, config rewritten to NAME

use_cases.name: Manage MCP Hero via the Admin MCP
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Connect AI client to `/admin-mcp` → conversational management tools usable

use_cases.name: Operator steps into an org for support
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Enter org, end sessions or clear stuck connection → recorded, no secrets seen

use_cases.name: Edit or remove an upstream
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Edit config or delete → config/variables/files/tools removed, dirty banner on edit

use_cases.name: Delete an organization
use_cases.trigger_outcome: Delete org → org and all its scoped data purged

happy_path.title: Add a remote HTTP upstream MCP
Add a hosted stdio upstream MCP
Connect / start the upstreams
happy_path.why: an upstream must exist (HP2/HP3) before it can connect

happy_path.title: Configure roles & per-MCP access
happy_path.why: needs discovered upstreams (HP4) to scope access to

happy_path.title: Member connects their AI client via Google OAuth
happy_path.why: the member must be invited (HP7) to authenticate into the org

happy_path.title: Member authenticates per-user OAuth to an upstream
happy_path.why: needs a gateway session (HP8) and a per-user-OAuth upstream (HP2)

happy_path.title: Member lists & calls tools through the gateway
happy_path.why: needs the connected session (HP8) and allowed tools (HP6)

happy_path.title: Headless agent calls tools via the service token
Admin reviews the audit log
happy_path.why: tool calls (HP10/HP12) must have happened to audit

subsystems.name: App bootstrap & runtime wiring
subsystems.purpose: Build the app, pick storage, assemble per-org runtimes, drain on shutdown

subsystems.name: Gateway (MCP protocol surface)
subsystems.purpose: Serve MCP clients at `/mcp`: list/call tools, route to upstreams, push changes

subsystems.name: Management MCP (admin & superadmin)
subsystems.purpose: Conversational management of the gateway and of the whole instance

subsystems.name: Dashboard REST API
subsystems.purpose: The `/api/*` surface the React dashboard calls

subsystems.name: Identity & access
subsystems.purpose: Authenticate clients/admins, mint/verify tokens, enforce roles & plans

subsystems.name: Gateway auth & service tokens
subsystems.purpose: Bearer auth for `/mcp`: Google-backed OAuth + `svct_` service tokens

subsystems.name: Policy, roles & plans
subsystems.purpose: Role→tool authorization, settings resolution, plan-limit gates, secret scan

subsystems.name: Dashboard sign-in & sessions
subsystems.purpose: Browser Google login, session cookies, org-context resolution, revocation

subsystems.name: Org & tenancy
subsystems.purpose: Org/membership CRUD, creation seeding, deletion cascade

subsystems.name: Upstream management
subsystems.purpose: Define, persist, connect, and keep healthy the proxied upstream MCPs

subsystems.name: Upstream config & catalog
subsystems.purpose: Persist upstream defs + options, load/merge mcp.json, cache discovered tools

subsystems.name: Upstream connections & clients
subsystems.purpose: Long-lived MCP sessions: HTTP + stdio clients, the connection manager

subsystems.name: Upstream OAuth lifecycle
subsystems.purpose: Token refresh, liveness probing, re-auth health email

subsystems.name: Sandbox execution (stdio MCPs)
subsystems.purpose: Run stdio MCPs in E2B / local sandboxes; files, variables, reconcile

subsystems.name: Persistence & storage
subsystems.purpose: The cross-cutting storage machinery: Mongo client, field encryption, audit, migrations

subsystems.name: Realtime & infra adapters
subsystems.purpose: Pub/sub event stream, rate limiter, distributed lock

subsystems.name: Observability & email
subsystems.purpose: Structured logs, Sentry, Mixpanel, transactional email

subsystems.name: Dashboard SPA (frontend)
subsystems.purpose: The React admin + marketing + docs single-page app

subsystems.name: Admin dashboard
subsystems.purpose: Upstreams, roles/access, team, tokens, audit, gateway, variables, files

subsystems.name: User & onboarding surfaces
subsystems.purpose: End-user connect / my-tools, join & signup, per-MCP OAuth popup

subsystems.name: Marketing & docs
subsystems.purpose: Public landing/pricing/legal pages + the docs renderer

subsystems.name: Superadmin console
subsystems.purpose: Cross-org operator dashboard

subsystems.name: Shared SPA infrastructure
subsystems.purpose: Router, API client, query hooks, auth context, UI kit, SSE

components.name: App factory / wiring spine
components.purpose: Builds the FastAPI app, mounts every sub-app, runs lifespan background loops

components.name: Gateway MCP app builder
components.purpose: Wraps `/mcp` with bearer auth + org-pin + slug-aware metadata middleware

components.name: Admin MCP app builder
components.purpose: Wraps `/admin-mcp/{slug}` with per-org admin-role gate

components.name: Superadmin MCP app builder
components.purpose: Wraps `/admin-mcp/system` with email-allowlist gate (cloud only)

components.name: Gateway controller (MCP server)
components.purpose: Low-level MCP server: list/call tools, list/read resources, prompts

components.name: Admin MCP controller
components.purpose: ~40 admin tools: upstream CRUD/connect, users, roles, audit

components.name: Superadmin MCP controller
components.purpose: 4 cross-org tools: list/get org, system status, delete org

components.name: Storage factory
components.purpose: Picks file (standalone) vs Mongo/Redis (cloud) repos; builds StorageBundle

components.name: Lifecycle / drain coordinator
components.purpose: Graceful SIGTERM drain; drives `/healthz` 503 while draining

components.name: Slug-aware OAuth helpers
components.purpose: Per-request protected-resource metadata + `WWW-Authenticate` from org slug

components.name: Org-context middleware
components.purpose: Resolves `/mcp/{slug}` → org_id, rewrites path, anti-enumeration 401

components.name: Service-token org-pin middleware
components.purpose: Pins `svct_` bearers to their org; slug mismatch 401s, fails closed

components.name: Rate-limit middleware (built, unwired)
components.purpose: Per-category limiter returning 429; present but not installed today

components.name: Dashboard REST API router
components.purpose: Composes 14 per-concern `/api/*` routers (upstreams, roles, users, audit…)

components.name: Dashboard auth (session cookie)
components.purpose: Browser login/logout/callback; HMAC session cookie; require_admin

components.name: Gateway Google OAuth callback
components.purpose: Public callback completing the gateway bearer Google flow

components.name: Org signup / public routes
components.purpose: `/api/orgs` create/list/switch/info/delete + one public invite read

components.name: Upstream OAuth callback
components.purpose: Public callback completing per-MCP upstream OAuth via signed state

components.name: Sandbox / debug / superadmin REST routers
components.purpose: Sandbox caps, observability smoke (404-masked), client-errors, superadmin API

components.name: Demo MCP server (dev)
components.purpose: Bundled "kitchen sink" FastMCP at `/dev/mcp-demo` with 5 widget kinds

components.name: OrgRuntimeManager
components.purpose: Per-org runtime lifecycle: build/cache policy_engine, registry, clients, router

components.name: OrgService
components.purpose: Org/membership CRUD, creation seeding, org-deletion cascade

components.name: PolicyEngine
components.purpose: Role→tool authorization, argument checks, is_admin

components.name: ToolRegistry
components.purpose: Per-upstream tool/resource/prompt discovery + cache; prefixed wire tools

components.name: ToolRouter
components.purpose: Route a gateway call to the right upstream session with heal+retry+audit

components.name: UpstreamConfigService
components.purpose: Upstream CRUD with side effects; secret-scan on save; cascade purge

components.name: UpstreamConnectionService
components.purpose: OAuth connect/reconnect/heal of live upstream sessions

components.name: OAuthRefresh
components.purpose: Background near-expiry token refresh; delete + notify on invalid_grant

components.name: OAuthLiveness
components.purpose: Periodic `list_tools` probe of live sessions; feed dead ones to reconnect

components.name: UpstreamHealthCheck
components.purpose: Send signed re-auth email for tokens flagged invalid_grant

components.name: UpstreamRuntimeHash
components.purpose: SHA-256 fingerprint of runtime inputs → dashboard "dirty / restart" banner

components.name: OAuthAppResolver
components.purpose: Match an upstream URL host to configured instance OAuth app credentials

components.name: PlanGates
components.purpose: Assert plan limits (seats, upstreams, roles); raise 402 + analytics event

components.name: PlanPolicy
components.purpose: Source of truth for per-plan limits + PlanLimitExceeded

components.name: PolicyNotifier
components.purpose: Debounced push of `tools/list_changed` to affected gateway sessions

components.name: SandboxService (boundary)
components.purpose: The Protocol every stdio sandbox backend implements + shared value types

components.name: SandboxResolver
components.purpose: Decide which sandbox provider an org's stdio session uses

components.name: SandboxReconciler (policy)
components.purpose: Reconcile live vs persisted sandboxes; orphan-kill + snapshot GC policy

components.name: SandboxPath
components.purpose: Confine a materialize-file path to the sandbox home (reject traversal)

components.name: SecretScanner
components.purpose: Heuristic raw-credential detection in upstream env/headers at save time

components.name: ServiceTokenService
components.purpose: Service-token lifecycle: mint / list / revoke / verify

components.name: SettingsResolver
components.purpose: Resolve effective MCP/tool access for a user or role, failing closed

components.name: StdoutFraming
components.purpose: Bounded newline-framing of a sandboxed MCP's stdout into JSON-RPC lines

components.name: SystemVariables / TemplateVarSubstitution
components.purpose: `${NAME}` substitution into command/args/env/url/headers at launch

components.name: UriWrapping / UrlSafety
components.purpose: Wrap/unwrap upstream resource & widget URIs; SSRF deny-list on URLs

components.name: ConnectionStore port + OAuthToken
components.purpose: Abstract port for stored upstream tokens + connection state; OAuthToken type

components.name: Connection repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Stored-token store; mongo encrypts access/refresh tokens

components.name: Field encryption (AES-256-GCM)
components.purpose: HKDF-derive key; encrypt/decrypt field values with `enc:v1:` prefix

components.name: Mongo client + OrgScopedCollection
components.purpose: The sole class touching a raw collection; injects org_id, transparent crypto

components.name: mcp.json store
components.purpose: Read/write upstreams in standard mcpServers JSON (file, single-org)

components.name: Upstream-config loader / merger
components.purpose: Merge mcp.json + options into UpstreamDefinitions; flatten import blobs

components.name: OAuth-apps loader
components.purpose: Load instance OAuth app credentials from env JSON or file

components.name: Upstream-config repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist UpstreamDefinitions; mongo encrypts config/options blobs

components.name: Config / policy repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist roles, users, options (one settings doc per org)

components.name: Organization repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist orgs + memberships; mongo enforces unique slug

components.name: OAuth-state repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist gateway OAuth provider state (clients, tokens) per org

components.name: Service-token repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist `svct_` registry (sha256 hash + org/label/role)

components.name: Template-var repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist per-MCP variables/secrets; mongo encrypts the value

components.name: Sandbox-file repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist per-MCP uploaded files; mongo encrypts contents

components.name: Sandbox-persistence repository (inmem + mongo)
components.purpose: Track current sandbox / paused-snapshot ref per (org,upstream)

components.name: Tool-catalog repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Persist discovered tool catalog so the UI survives restarts

components.name: Audit repository (file + mongo)
components.purpose: Append-only audit log + search; mongo TTL by retention days

components.name: One-shot Mongo migrations
components.purpose: Irreversible at-rest migrations (encrypt upstreams; normalize sandbox refs)

components.name: UpstreamClientManager
components.purpose: Owns all long-lived MCP sessions; state machine, stall-heal, idle sweep

components.name: HTTP upstream MCP client
components.purpose: One streamable-http MCP connection over an SSRF-safe transport

components.name: stdio upstream MCP client
components.purpose: One stdio MCP session over the SandboxService boundary

components.name: Connection-task base + SSRF transport + log buffers
components.purpose: Shared task lifecycle; re-validating httpx transport; redacting stderr buffers

components.name: E2B sandbox service
components.purpose: Prod SandboxService over E2B: session/pause/resume, volumes, docker daemon

components.name: E2B sandbox reconciler
components.purpose: Startup sweep killing orphan sandboxes / GC unknown snapshots

components.name: E2B template grid
components.purpose: The 24-template grid (node/python/docker × 8 CPU/RAM) + capabilities

components.name: Local-subprocess sandbox service
components.purpose: Dev-only no-isolation SandboxService spawning a host subprocess

components.name: Gateway OAuth provider + service-token verifier
components.purpose: Issue gateway bearers via Google; route `svct_` to the token verifier

components.name: SPA root + router
components.purpose: Route table, QueryClient, AuthContext; DefaultRedirect resolves `/app` per role

components.name: API client / fetch layer
components.purpose: `apiFetch` with cookie auth + X-Org-Slug; ApiError/PlanLimitError typing

components.name: React-query resource hooks
components.purpose: `useUpstreams` / `useFeatures` / `useOrgSlug` org-scoped caches

components.name: Auth / session context
components.purpose: Loads `/api/auth/me`, holds user, wires Sentry + analytics, 401 handler

components.name: Upstreams page
components.purpose: Add HTTP/stdio MCP, sandbox sizing, import, live status via SSE

components.name: Upstream detail page + LogViewer
components.purpose: Single-MCP edit; inline log stream over SSE; variables & files managers

components.name: Roles & Access page
components.purpose: Per-role MCP access, 3-state tool toggles, category defaults, argument checks

components.name: McpAccessTable + ToolAccessSection
components.purpose: Shared access table reused by Access + User pages

components.name: Users / Team page
components.purpose: List/add members, assign role, invite link, remove; per-user detail

components.name: Service Tokens page
components.purpose: Mint/revoke `svct_` tokens scoped to one org+role; value shown once

components.name: Audit log page
components.purpose: Filterable audit table with live SSE tail

components.name: Template Variables manager
components.purpose: Per-MCP variable/password editor with write-time redaction

components.name: Sandbox files manager
components.purpose: Per-MCP file editor; system-variable hints

components.name: Org switcher / org context
components.purpose: Header dropdown switching active org; slug drives scoped queries

components.name: Gateway connection-info page
components.purpose: Shows `/mcp` URL + config snippet, connected users, admin disconnect

components.name: Marketing site + MarketingLayout
components.purpose: Public landing/pricing/legal pages under a buyer-shaped shell

components.name: Docs page (markdown renderer)
components.purpose: `/docs/:slug` renders user docs with a curated sidebar + hash anchors

components.name: Join / Signup / OAuth flow
components.purpose: Invite landing, org-creation signup, per-MCP OAuth popup

components.name: User dashboard (Connect + My Tools)
components.purpose: End-user gateway setup + per-MCP connect/disconnect

components.name: Shared UI kit
components.purpose: base-ui/tailwind primitives: button, table, toggles, id-input

components.name: Shared dialogs + badges
components.purpose: Confirm/Import/Promo/Secret/Upgrade dialogs; status/role badges; dirty banner

components.name: Dashboard shell (layout + sidebar)
components.purpose: Auth-gated layout + role-aware sidebar nav

components.name: Admin MCP page
components.purpose: Read-only listing of the `/admin-mcp` tool catalog

components.name: Superadmin dashboard
components.purpose: Cross-org browse + soft actions, gated by SuperadminGuard

components.name: EventSource / SSE hook
components.purpose: `useEventSource` to `/api/events` backing live status / audit / connect

components.name: Upstream action + config widgets
components.purpose: Action buttons, capacity pills, sandbox select, JSON editor, tool table

components.name: Cross-cutting libs (analytics/sentry/errors)
components.purpose: Mixpanel, Sentry, client-error reporter, plan-limit upgrade opener, i18n

components.name: Pending-auth coordinator
components.purpose: Coordinate the upstream OAuth callback dance via signed HMAC state

components.name: Dashboard Google OAuth provider + dev stub
components.purpose: Sign admins into the dashboard via Google (httpx); dev email-picker stub

components.name: MCP SDK token-storage adapter
components.purpose: Implement the mcp SDK TokenStorage port over ConnectionStore

components.name: Email sender (smtp + stub)
components.purpose: Outbound mail via aiosmtplib; stub records without sending

components.name: Analytics client (Mixpanel)
components.purpose: Fire-and-forget product analytics with hashed emails

components.name: Sentry setup
components.purpose: Init Sentry with user/org enrichment + header scrubbing

components.name: Structlog setup + redact processor
components.purpose: Configure one JSON log stream; mask secret-shaped keys

components.name: Distributed lock (mongo + noop)
components.purpose: Cross-process lock for cloud token refresh; noop for standalone

components.name: Event stream (inprocess + redis)
components.purpose: SSE pub/sub: asyncio queues (standalone) vs Redis channels (cloud)

components.name: Rate limiter (inprocess + redis)
components.purpose: Sliding-window limiter: deque vs Redis ZSET+Lua; fails open

components.name: Session revocation (inprocess + redis)
components.purpose: Logged-out-cookie deny-list keyed by jti; fails open

components.name: Gateway session registry
components.purpose: In-process map of gateway session_id → (org,user)

deps.name: MongoDB
deps.used_for: Cloud persistence for all repos + distributed lock

deps.name: Redis
deps.used_for: Pub/sub event stream, rate limiting, session revocation

deps.name: E2B sandboxes
deps.used_for: Isolated execution of stdio MCP servers

deps.name: Upstream MCP servers
deps.used_for: The servers whose tools the gateway aggregates

deps.name: Vector
deps.used_for: Sidecar shipping structlog JSON to Elastic

entry_points.trigger: Connect all org runtimes + seed demo at boot

subdomains.name: Tenancy & access policy
subdomains.purpose: Orgs, memberships, plans, roles, and the per-tool access rules

subdomains.name: Upstream & transport
subdomains.purpose: Upstream definitions, transports, and their auth configuration

subdomains.name: Credentials & secrets
subdomains.purpose: Service tokens, stored OAuth tokens, variables, sandbox files

subdomains.name: Tool catalog
subdomains.purpose: The discovered tools/resources/prompts cached per upstream

subdomains.name: Audit & events
subdomains.purpose: The append-only audit log and the realtime event bus

entities.name: Organization
entities.meaning: A tenant — the top-level isolation boundary everything is scoped to.

relations.how: org-scoped by org_id; no field on the definition

entities.name: Subscription
entities.meaning: The org's billing plan, held separately so future billing fields don't bloat Organization.

entities.name: PlanName
entities.meaning: Enumerated plan tier.

entities.name: Membership
entities.meaning: A human user's seat in one org, carrying their role name.

entities.name: SettingsConfig
entities.meaning: The per-org policy config root — upstream options, roles, and user→role assignments.

entities.name: RoleDefinition
entities.meaning: A named role: admin/default flags plus its access settings.

entities.name: UserDefinition
entities.meaning: A user's role assignment inside the policy config.

entities.name: RoleSettings
entities.meaning: The access controls attached to a role: which MCPs and tools it may use.

entities.name: McpAccessConfig
entities.meaning: Auto-enable flag plus a per-MCP allow/deny map.

entities.name: ToolAccessConfig
entities.meaning: Per-upstream tool allow/deny: category defaults, per-tool overrides, fallback.

entities.name: ArgumentConstraint
entities.meaning: A regex allow/forbid rule on a tool argument.

entities.name: UpstreamOptions
entities.meaning: Per-upstream display/auth options in the policy config (parallel to the runtime def).

entities.name: UpstreamDefinition
entities.meaning: A registered backend MCP server — transport choice, its config, and auth.

entities.name: TransportType
entities.meaning: How the gateway talks to an upstream: stdio sandbox or streamable HTTP.

entities.name: StdioTransportConfig
entities.meaning: Launch config for a sandboxed stdio MCP: command, args, env, sandbox sizing.

entities.name: HttpTransportConfig
entities.meaning: Connection config for a remote HTTP MCP: URL and static headers.

entities.name: UpstreamAuthConfig
entities.meaning: How the upstream authenticates: service-account token or OAuth (admin / per-user).

entities.name: AuthMode
entities.meaning: The upstream auth strategy.

entities.name: OAuthAppEntry
entities.meaning: Pre-registered OAuth client credentials for an upstream domain.

entities.name: UpstreamSelfDescription
entities.meaning: Free-form text an upstream advertises at initialize, folded into the gateway's own initialize.

relations.how: keyed by upstream id at connect time

entities.name: ServerInfo
entities.meaning: An upstream's reported server name/version/title.

entities.name: ServiceTokenRecord
entities.meaning: A headless bearer credential pinned to one org and role; only the sha256 hash is stored.

entities.name: OAuthToken
entities.meaning: A stored OAuth credential for an upstream (admin or per-user) with refresh bookkeeping.

relations.how: keyed by (org,upstream,user) in the connection store

entities.name: TemplateVarSummary
entities.meaning: A per-MCP `${NAME}` variable (secret or plain) substituted into upstream config at launch.

entities.name: SandboxFile
entities.store: Mongo encrypted / file, keyed by org+upstream
entities.meaning: A per-MCP uploaded credential/config file the launcher writes into the sandbox before exec.

relations.how: the metadata-only dashboard view, contents stripped

entities.name: SandboxFileSummary
entities.store: view DTO — never persisted with contents
entities.meaning: Metadata-only view of a SandboxFile (no contents) for the dashboard.

entities.name: ToolCatalogSnapshot
entities.meaning: Cached per-upstream catalog of tools/resources/prompts so the admin UI renders without a reconnect.

entities.name: DiscoveredTool
entities.meaning: One tool advertised by an upstream, with its prefixed gateway name and schema.

entities.name: ToolAnnotations
entities.meaning: MCP behavior hints (readOnly/destructive/idempotent/openWorld) used in policy matching.

entities.name: DiscoveredResource
entities.meaning: One resource advertised by an upstream.

entities.name: DiscoveredResourceTemplate
entities.meaning: One RFC 6570 resource template advertised by an upstream.

entities.name: DiscoveredPrompt
entities.meaning: One prompt template advertised by an upstream, with its arguments.

entities.name: PromptArgument
entities.meaning: One declared argument of a discovered prompt.

entities.name: AuditEntry
entities.meaning: One audited gateway action — what tool was called and whether policy allowed it (never argument values).

entities.name: Event
entities.meaning: A typed message on the realtime bus, targeted at one user email or broadcast.

steps.phrase: signs in with Google in the browser
redirects the signed-in creator to the app
posts the new org name and slug
checks seat/org plan limits

steps.note: seeds default admin + user roles and the creator as admin

steps.phrase: returns the created org, lands on Upstream MCPs

flows.title: Add a remote HTTP upstream MCP

steps.phrase: pastes the upstream URL and picks an auth mode

steps.note: scans the config for raw secrets

steps.phrase: shows the upstream added, ready to connect

flows.title: Add a hosted stdio upstream MCP

steps.phrase: pastes command JSON, fills variables, sizes the sandbox
checks the stdio-upstream plan limit

steps.note: admin saves the `${NAME}` variables and passwords
encrypts secret values at rest

steps.phrase: clicks Connect / Start

steps.note: HTTP upstream opens a streamable-http session
stdio upstream launches in a sandbox
refresh and cache the discovered tools

steps.phrase: tools light up, live status via SSE
creates a role and toggles which MCPs it can use
checks the custom-role plan limit

steps.note: publishes a policy_changed event

steps.phrase: pushes tools/list_changed to affected sessions
sets 3-state tool toggles and regex allow/forbid rules

steps.note: refreshes the changed upstream before notifying

steps.phrase: adds a Google email and picks a role
checks seat capacity
returns a shareable invite link

flows.title: Member connects their AI client via Google OAuth

steps.phrase: points their MCP client at the gateway URL

steps.note: resolves the org slug from the path
completes the Google sign-in
the Google callback finishes the bearer issue
registers the session under (org, user)

steps.phrase: the role's tools are now available in the client

flows.title: Member authenticates per-user OAuth to an upstream

steps.phrase: clicks Authenticate on a per-user-OAuth upstream

steps.note: starts a signed pending-auth flow
opens the upstream OAuth authorize URL
the upstream callback completes the flow
stores the per-user token (encrypted in cloud)

steps.phrase: the upstream's tools become callable as themselves

flows.title: Member lists & calls tools through the gateway

steps.phrase: asks the client to list and call a tool

steps.note: filters tools to the member's role
returns the prefixed wire tools

steps.phrase: forwards the chosen tool call

steps.note: re-checks the call against tool + argument policy
dispatches to the upstream session
audits the call decision and outcome

steps.phrase: returns the tool result
names a token and picks a least-privilege role
returns the raw `svct_` value once, with a config snippet

flows.title: Headless agent calls tools via the service token

steps.phrase: sends `Authorization: Bearer svct_…` to the org gateway URL

steps.note: verifies the token and resolves its org + role scopes
pins the request to the token's org
authorizes tools at the token's boundary role
dispatches to the upstream
audits under the `svc:` identity

steps.phrase: returns the tool result, no sign-in needed
opens Audit and sets user/MCP/tool filters

steps.note: subscribes to the live audit tail
streams new entries over SSE

steps.phrase: returns matching entries plus the live tail

flows.title: Manage MCP Hero via the Admin MCP

steps.phrase: connects their AI client to `/admin-mcp/{slug}`

steps.note: Google bearer auth (service tokens rejected here)
checks the user is an admin in this org
runs an upstream/user/role management tool

steps.phrase: returns the management result conversationally
confirms deleting the org

steps.note: removes the org and memberships
purges policy config
purges upstream definitions
purges stored tokens
purges service tokens
purges the audit log

steps.phrase: confirms the org and all scoped data are gone

edges.why: pin service tokens to their org
bearer auth on the admin MCP
bearer auth on the superadmin MCP
filter tools to the caller's role
enforce plan limits in admin tools
resolve the slug to an org
purge the audit log on delete
match a host to an OAuth app
open a stdio session in a sandbox
run the stdio MCP in E2B

security.risk: cross-org isolation via the slug→org contextvar
slug mismatch 401s; fails closed if scope missing

security.who: OAuth user who is admin in that org
security.risk: per-org gate; service tokens structurally rejected
cloud-only; allowlist is the sole gate
HMAC cookie, 7-day TTL, optional jti revocation
integrity rests on the signed state
middleware built but not installed today

config.purpose: public gateway base URL (falls back to SERVER_URL)
E2B SDK auth (required when sandbox=e2b in cloud)

tests_note: No — read-only against the test layout and CLAUDE.md; all rows

tests.gap: role-surface + fail-closed pinning are pinned by unit tests
per-org `is_admin` isolation gate has a named test
drift guard asserts every org-scoped repo is purged
real-SDK path only runs when `E2B_API_KEY` is set
stall/reattach edge cases are flaky per project notes
